details.productUrlName: Eidolon of the Great Revel Top 8

customAttributes.description:
Please Note: This printing of Eidolon of the Great Revel features a metallic Top 8 stamp commemorating a Store Championship Top 8 win, and a Store Name. The Store Name on the card you will receive will be RANDOM For a non-randomized version of this Store Championship Promo, please shop Listings with Photos.

Whenever a player casts a spell with mana value 3 or less, Eidolon of the Great Revel deals 2 damage to that player.

details.setUrlName: Game Day and Store Championship Promos
